title: Organ Harvest Protocol: Intestine
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5glkl","text":"Organ harvesting protocol for HuBMAP small and large intestine.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Submerge in chilled UW/HTK - do not wrap in surgical towel. Triple bag the tissue.
Label the specimen bag with project code, tissue, size and donor number
Package on wet ice and maintain at 2-8 °C until shipment. Contact NDRI immediately following procurement.
If possible, do not ligate the inferior mesentric artery prior to cross-clamp and flush. Cross-clamp and flush with UW/HTK.
creator: Joanna Bi
